caption: A woman with black hair and glasses stands against a dark, plain background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved top featuring small red floral patterns and decorative embroidery around the neckline, paired with a dark beaded necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her shirt. Across the sequence, she is speaking, with her facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as she talks. Her gaze remains fixed forward toward the camera. In the bottom-left corner of each shot, a small golden logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". The lighting is consistent, focusing on her face and upper body, while the background remains a static, dark void. No other people or objects are present in the scene.
